# hayao.js

> An AI-first game engine: a deterministic, headless-native simulation kernel with a
> Godot-style scene tree, pluggable renderers (SVG / Canvas / headless), and a built-in
> verification harness — designed so an LLM can author, test, and prove correct a whole
> game without ever opening a browser. Same seed, same build → same result, every run.

Start a new project in one command: `npm create hayao@latest my-game` (scaffolds a
runnable project whose starter game already generates a solver-proven, ramped
campaign). Or add to an existing project: `npm i hayao`. Import only from `@hayao`.
MIT licensed.

Key invariants when writing hayao games:
- All randomness flows through `world.rng`; never `Date.now`, `Math.random`, or argless `new Date` in the sim.
- Turn-based/puzzle rules live in a pure `Puzzle<State, Move>` module; every level is machine-proven winnable.
- **Generate content, don't hand-author volume.** `generateLevels` / `composeCampaign`
  emit solver-verified levels inside a difficulty band; `rampIssues` / `assertRamp`
  prove the whole curve is well-shaped. An hour of content ships as a list of seeds,
  every level proven — not forty hand-drawn maps.
- DOM is for menus only; pure-view scene nodes set `cosmetic = true` so they stay out of `world.hash()`.
- Verify with `npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run verify`; assert on `world.probe()` / `world.hash()`.
  `npm run eval` scores every game on proof coverage (winnable · determinism · ramp · feel · generated · code-as-art).

## Docs

- [Operating manual for agents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/AGENTS.md): the full conventions and workflow — read this first
- [API digest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/API.md): everything importable from `@hayao`, auto-generated
- [Quickstart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md): install from npm, define a game, prove it headlessly
- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): how the kernel, scene tree, and renderers fit together
- [Engine internals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/ENGINE.md): the simulation kernel in depth
- [Conventions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md): code and project conventions for examples
- [Verification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/VERIFICATION.md): the proof harness — solvers, bots, golden replays, ablation & agency gates
- [Workshop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/WORKSHOP.md): the human/AI playtest loop — replayable sessions, live knobs, the MCP sidecar
- [Audio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/AUDIO.md): procedural sound and music — SoundSpec, songs, the mix bus
- [Coin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/COIN.md): a whole game as one self-proving HTML file
- [Game-design playbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/design/FUN.md): what makes each genre fun — the verification half (proves a genre is fair)
- [Design Codex](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/design/README.md): the generative half — turn a high-level intent ("an RTS with faction asymmetry") into a concrete design. 216 cross-linked modules (process · anchors · genres · systems · mechanics · worldbuilding · patterns · antipatterns · recipes); find the spine (the load-bearing tension), anchor to a proven game, compose modular systems, then twist into "X but Y". Browse the [searchable index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/design/INDEX.md)
- The whole manual also renders at [hayao.dev/docs](https://hayao.dev/docs/), the Codex at [hayao.dev/docs/codex](https://hayao.dev/docs/codex/)

## Site

- [Play](https://hayao.dev/play/): machine-verified games running live in the browser — a platformer (Small Flame), a puzzle (Lumen), and the Sokoban reference example
- [Coin](https://hayao.dev/play/coin/): play and download a real Coin — one self-proving HTML file, seal re-provable with `npx hayao open --assay`
- [Create](https://hayao.dev/create/): the three on-ramps (quickstart · design with the Codex · from scratch) plus the sound engine and the Workshop
- [Sandboxes](https://hayao.dev/docs/sandbox/): twelve single-mechanic labs — learn one primitive in isolation, never a whole game's design
- [Themes](https://hayao.dev/docs/themes/): Regalia, the default look — palette, duotone art kit, UI chrome, audio voice

## Examples

- [Sokoban source](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/examples/sokoban): the reference example — copy this to start a new game
- [Lumen source](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/examples/lumen): the generator reference — every board composed by the solver-backed generator, served on an Elo curve
- [All example sources](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/examples): every game's pure logic, view, tests, and golden replay
- [Sandbox sources](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/tree/main/sandboxes): the single-mechanic labs — physics, particles, camera, pathfinding, juice, procgen, synth, animation, WebGL, cards, the hero rig, 2D lighting

## Optional

- [Build log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/BUILDLOG.md): the Build-Measure-Learn campaign, game by game
- [Lessons](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js/main/docs/LESSONS.md): engine lessons distilled from the campaign
- [Repository](https://github.com/hellojanpacan/hayao-js): source, issues, CI
